description_long: This is a tall, modern office building with a rectangular footprint and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is dominated by a grid of large, evenly spaced windows set within a light gray structural frame, giving the building a sleek and contemporary appearance. The lower levels feature a recessed area, likely for a lobby or parking, and the ground is surrounded by a paved area with adjacent roads. The roof includes mechanical structures and green spaces, suggesting amenities or utility areas. Vertical fins and subtle facade articulations add depth and visual interest to the otherwise regular window pattern. The building sits on a landscaped plot with a road curving around its base, integrating it into an urban environment.
description: A tall, modern office building with a grid of large windows, light gray facade, and landscaped surroundings. The structure features a recessed lower level and rooftop amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with a prominent grid of windows and a recessed lower level, likely the main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's narrow profile and the road curving along its base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical window arrangement and additional access points at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the building's height and the adjacent road layout.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform vertical and horizontal grid of rectangular windows, evenly spaced across all facades.
